Supraspinatus m. (Cut)
Origin: Supraspinous fossa of scapula
Insertion: Greater tubercle of humerus
title: Posterior View of Scapular Region (Right Side)
subtitle: (Supraspinatus, Infraspinatus, and Teres Minor mm. Cut)
